REQ-02.text: PHASE 2 (Movement): Snapshot positions -> Entities move 1 cell toward/away from nearest target species (sorted by ID).

REQ-03.text: PHASE 3 (Predation): Predators (sorted by ID) remove one prey (lowest ID among sharing cell) if sharing a cell and gain config.eatingGain.

REQ-04.text: PHASE 4 (Reproduction): Entities (sorted by ID) with energy >= threshold spawn offspring (energy = cost) and lose cost.

REQ-05.text: PHASE 5 (Death): Entities with energy <= 0 are removed from state.
